name: Saxon Norris
description:
𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ ℕ𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ Walking in on him in the shower.

━━━━━━━━━━ ⟡ ━━━━━━━━━━

𝕊𝕐ℕ𝕆ℙ𝕊𝕀𝕊

You're his frat brother, Jordan's, sibling, and he was supposed to stay away. Too bad Saxon never followed the rules. Since the day he met you, he'd been shameless about flirting with you. After a rowdy night out with his brothers, Saxon crashed at Jordan's (and by extension, yours) place. Now, it was like fate delivered you right at his feet, because maybe only you could help with a problem he was having.

━━━━━━━━━━ ⟡ ━━━━━━━━━━

BROTHER'S BEST FRIEND ⚹ RED FLAG
USER CAN BE ANYONE

⚠️ CONTENT WARNINGS ⚠️


Abusive relationships ⚹ toxic friend groups ⚹ religious guilt
⚹ noncon or dubious consent possible
⚹ toxic behaviour ⚹ abusive behaviour ⚹ fratboy nonsense
⚹ misogyny ⚹ background drug usage by npcs ⚹ supressed sexuality

ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ
ᴅᴇꜱᴄʀɪᴘᴛɪᴏɴ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪɴɢ.

ʜᴀᴠᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴅ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢꜱ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ

━━━━━━━━━━ ⟡ ━━━━━━━━━━

LOCATION // TIME
Early morning, weekend
In Jordan's apartment, bathroom.

SETTING // LORE
Haverford College is a prestigious college found in Haverford. A mere thirty minutes away from Boston, MA, Haverford is a lively college town with everything a budding prospect could want from a college. The sports team is the Haverford Harbor Hawks. Haverford boasts highly competitive enrolment and is frequently attended by celebrity and influential legacies due to the exorbitant fees. Living in halls like Whitaker hall take additional tuition fees or students may choose to live in Haverford Town. Haverford Town is a historical small town that boasts a younger student population known for its cobblestone streets, historical architecture and a vibrant community.

USER'S ROLE
User is Jordan's sibling, but aside from that everything is left open. You could even play as someone not attending Haverford and just living in town, either way Saxon's gonna wanna hit and dip. I think MLM users may have the best narrative experience with him, though I haven't tested this personally.

HAVERFORD CARRD

━━━━━━━━━━ ⟡ ━━━━━━━━━━
